# QuickSearch (QS) Copilot Instructions

This repository is governed by ADC.

Before reasoning, planning, or writing code for QuickSearch (QS), read:

1. `.adc/index.md`
2. `.adc/prompt-rules.md`
3. Any scoped convention file under `.adc/standards/` that matches the requested work

QS means QuickSearch. Keep repository files and generated artifacts in English unless the user explicitly asks otherwise. Do not write secrets, tokens, mapped-drive credentials, or real ContextGraph credentials into tracked files.
